title: [codereview-pass1-correctness] TDMA beacon format in 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:15-60 lacks exact CDDL schema, byte layout, SCHC rule ID, and full test vector reference; join procedure omits exact CoAP URI or L2 frame type
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:57 - Missing precise packet definitions prevents interop between Rust/Zephyr/Python impls. Must match test/vectors/ exactly. Discovered during first correctness review of ve27 update.
